title: agentenv Configuration
description: Configuration schema for agentenv (.agentrc.yaml). Source-driven model: declare a single `source` tool, then opt-in to writer `targets`.

source.description: Source-of-truth target whose native layout feeds every capability pipeline (hooks, skills, agents). Required when `targets` is non-empty. Setting `source: claude-code` also implicitly imports marketplaces / plugins from `~/.claude/settings.json` and `<project>/.claude/settings.json` (missing files are tolerated). v1 only implements `claude-code` as a source — setting any other value will fail validation until those readers ship.

marketplaces.description: Marketplaces by namespace. Required unless use_claude_config is true and Claude's settings.json provides extraKnownMarketplaces.

plugins.description: Plugins to import from marketplace. All plugins are parsed as Claude-shaped (skills/<name>/SKILL.md, agents/<name>.md).

targets.description: Set membership map of tools to materialize the canonical for. Empty per-target object (`cursor: {}`) opts the target in; path conventions and translation rules live in each capability's writers, not here.

additionalProperties.description: Per-target options. Currently empty — reserved for future per-target settings.

gitignore_managed_links.description: Maintain a managed block in <project>/.gitignore listing every symlink/copy agentenv currently owns. User-authored .gitignore lines outside the sentinel-delimited block are preserved. `agentenv clean` removes the block entirely.

instruction_files.description: Cross-tool instruction-file propagation. Each key is a source file at the project root (e.g. CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, CURSOR.md). Each value is a list of project-relative destination paths to symlink it from. Never overrides existing user files; agentenv-managed symlinks are updated to point at the current source.

items.description: Destination path relative to the project root.

pruneEmptyDirs.description: Remove directories left empty after managed links are removed (stops at project root).
